Structures and constants for binary logging and a logging system with unique token replacement.


## Files
- **[binary_logging.h](binary_logging.h.md)**: Defines structures and constants for binary logging, including message headers and parameter bodies.
- **[log_hashing.h](log_hashing.h.md)**: Header file for a logging system that replaces logging strings with unique tokens to conserve firmware space.
